candidates.reason: Public Kaggle stock/index regime labels are already consumed where exact-underlying attachment is allowed; they do not cover intraday/monthly, Kraken, missing exact instruments, or rejected near-underlying slots.
HF TSIE remains a narrow IDX/240m/1d source; previous gates found it not attachable to the full MainRegimeV2 provider/instrument/timeframe matrix.
TradingView market-regime indicators generate states from price/volume math and technical indicators; they do not provide independent source labels or replayable positive/negative event windows.

Regime Compass advertises multi-symbol/timeframe support but its components are ADX, Bollinger position, ATR volatility, Hurst exponent, and volume profile; this is feature/proxy logic, not a source-label panel.

QuantHQ HMM regime API is an authenticated service returning model-generated signals. It is not accessible in this environment and is not an independent label panel for all required roots/cycles/species.
The arXiv hierarchical HMM paper is methodology/provenance for regime modeling, not a downloadable exact-underlying label panel for Bull/Bear/Sideways/Crisis across the board matrix.

The Ethereum market-regime paper/source result is a research article around market-regime modeling; it does not expose an attachable MainRegimeV2 source-label panel for the required instruments/timeframes.

web_search_queries: QuantFrontier Mastering Market Regimes Adaptive Trading Strategies Hidden Markov Models URL
